ratchet_policy: Bumped 2026-06-10 to absorb ADR-048 SPEC 1 (#1574) — the new scistudio.previewers subsystem ships 9 structurally-similar core fallback providers (each assembles a PreviewEnvelope with the 6 metadata flags + payload), which cluster tightly under the cosine 0.92 threshold. The duplicate PERCENTAGE improved (14.06% -> 13.17%) because the codebase grew; only the absolute count/LOC ratchets moved (88->94 clusters, 5038->5427 LOC) and max_cluster_size tightened 10->8. Headroom ~5% on counts + LOC + pct, max_cluster_size pinned at current 8. Follow-up: consolidate the provider envelope-building boilerplate and re-ratchet DOWN under #1578. Prior bump (2026-05-22) absorbed ADR-045 (#1401) version-vector wrappers.
